title: Maa Inti Devatha
subTitle: Bhoomi, a young woman, is an only child who longs for the warmth and love of a joint family. Her wish is fulfilled when she gets married, but she strives to win over her husband's large family.

title: Bhairavi
subTitle: Bhairavi has a loving mother but an evil father. However, despite her affectionate nature, she faces betrayal from the family.

title: Constable Manju
subTitle: Once martyred in the line of duty, a constable's position is inherited by his incorruptible daughter. However, soon, she encounters the benevolent enforcer of a notorious criminal.

title: Ammaku Prematho
subTitle: Two siblings, who have been separated as children, cross paths in search of the same individual after she is released from prison following a murder conviction.

title: Bhamalu Satya Bhamalu
subTitle: The host invites contestants to the stage to share their stories and compete in various entertaining games to win prizes.

title: Kottaga Rekkalochenna
subTitle: Kaveri's life drastically changes when she meets Arjun. However, she faces new challenges, when Arjun's mother approaches her regarding the rift she has with her son.

title: Abhinandana
subTitle: Rahul and Abhisarika are childhood lovers who have grown apart. However, later, Abhisarika changes her look and marries Rahul, concealing her true identity from him.

title: Sivangi
subTitle: A village belle with a strong character takes care of her family members. Furthermore, she embarks on a journey alone to overcome financial issues and provide a good lifestyle for her dear ones.

title: Constable Manju
subTitle: Once martyred in the line of duty, a constable's position is inherited by his incorruptible daughter. However, soon, she encounters the benevolent enforcer of a notorious criminal.

subTitle: The host invites contestants to the stage to share their stories and compete in various entertaining games to win prizes.

title: Srihari Kalyanam
subTitle: Lakshmi, devoted to her family, weds Srihari, vowing to keep supporting her loved ones. Their marriage soon faces unexpected trials, testing their bond and joy.

title: Bhairavi
subTitle: Bhairavi has a loving mother but an evil father. However, despite her affectionate nature, she faces betrayal from the family.

title: Bhakti Geethalu
subTitle: Bhakti Geethalu

title: Nandhini
subTitle: A young housemaid religiously worships a snake mound. However, she is unaware that it is actually a cobra that is waiting to unleash its fury on the members of the household and exact revenge.

title: Ranga Ranga Panduranga
subTitle: Sakhu is a pure-hearted devotee of Lord Panduranga, and her selflessness ultimately draw her closer to divinity. This gives rise to jealousy and betrayal, but her faith remains unshakable.

title: Pedarayudu
subTitle: Pedarayudu, the eldest brother, sits on a cursed ancestral throne that kills anyone who delivers the wrong verdict. However, things take a turn when his youngest brother is accused of murder.

subTitle: Vikranth Surana, a hi-tech thief, conducts a series of robberies on corrupt politicians. When he robs Home Minister Jayendra's house, the latter appoints a special officer to track him.
